title: All For Nigeria’s Path To A Trillion-Dollar Economy - FinancialEDGE
description: The 36th Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) and Business Editors seminar took place in Abuja, bringing together industry leaders to discuss the theme "Playing the Global Game, Banking Recapitalization, Towards a One Trillion Dollar Economy." The seminar provided a platform for in-depth discussions on the role of banking recapitalization in driving Nigeria's economic growth
html:
The 36th Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) and Business Editors seminar took place in Abuja, bringing together industry leaders to discuss the theme “Playing the Global Game, Banking Recapitalization, Towards a One Trillion Dollar Economy.”

The seminar provided a platform for in-depth discussions on the role of banking recapitalization in driving Nigeria’s economic growth and achieving its ambitious goal of becoming a one-trillion-dollar economy.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director Financial Edge, Udo Onyeka Publisher News Business, Kenneth Madueke Publisher Open Business and Olalekan Ajayi Head of Media Relations Central Bank Of Nigeria (CBN) at the 36th Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) and Business Editors seminar in Abuja, with the theme: “Playing the Global Game, Banking Recapitalization, Towards a One Trillion Dollar Economy.
